Design System

PicYourBooth

Web design tokens, typography, color palette, and component reference. Source of truth for all PicYourBooth pages — photobooth and DJ.

Architecture

How This Works

PicYourBooth uses a three-layer system: Shadcn/ui base components → PYB theme layer → segment-specific overrides. No custom UI is built from scratch.

THREE LAYERS

1. Shadcn/ui

Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS. Accessible, unstyled, copy-paste components. Button, Card, Input, Switch, Dialog, Accordion, etc.

2. PYB Theme

CSS variables in globals.css override Shadcn defaults. Dark cinematic base (#08080b), gold accent (#d4b14e), Bebas Neue + Space Grotesk fonts.

3. Segment Overrides

data-segment attribute on page containers swaps --primary. Gold for photobooth, violet for DJ hub, coral for Gianni, cyan for Milo.

THE FLOW

1. Install Shadcn component → lands in src/components/ui/button.tsx

2. PYB theme variables style it automatically → dark bg, gold accent, Bebas Neue headings

3. Build PYB composition on top → PackageBuilder = Card + Switch + Badge + Button

4. Page sets data-segment="dj" → accent swaps from gold to violet

5. Impeccable skills (/audit, /polish) QA the result against .impeccable.md

Design System Hierarchy

LayerFileScope
Parent (this file)pyb-design-system-web.htmlShared tokens, typography, Shadcn mapping — all pages inherit
Photobooth pagespyb-design-system-photobooth.htmlHomepage, Magic Mirror, Party Booth, Proposal Form mockups
DJ pagespyb-design-system-dj.htmlDJ Hub, Gianni profile, Milo profile, Spotify, Booking Wizard
Meta Adspyb-design-system-meta-ads.htmlAd creative mockups (8 variations)
Component specscomponent-library.mdFull Shadcn install list, PYB variants, Tailwind config
Impeccable context.impeccable.md (root)Design context for quality skills (/audit, /polish, /typeset)

Brand

One Brand, Two Worlds

PicYourBooth is one premium entertainment brand. Photobooth and DJ pages share typography and dark base. Section accent colors differentiate.

PageAccentUsage
Photobooth (all)#d4b14e goldCTAs, price pills, VIP badges, toggle active, nav button
DJ Hub#8b5cf6 violetDJ CTAs (Boek een DJ), step numbers, shared accent
DJ Gianni#f0654a coralProfile color, genre tags, play button, set items
Milo#22d3ee cyanProfile color, genre tags, play button, set items

Foundations

Color Palette

Dark luxury base. Gold for photobooth. Violet for DJs. Coral and cyan for individual DJ profiles. No red, no pink.

Base

#050508
Void
DJ page background
#08080b
Background
Photobooth page bg
#111116
Surface
Cards, panels
#18181e
Elevated
Active states, totals
#ededf0
Text
Primary text
60%
Muted
Descriptions

Accents

#d4b14e
Gold
Photobooth CTAs
#8b5cf6
Violet
DJ Hub CTAs
#f0654a
Coral
DJ Gianni
#22d3ee
Cyan
Milo
#34d399
Success
Confirmations

UI

0.06
Border
Default
0.12
Border Hover
Hover state

Typography

Bebas Neue + Space Grotesk

Bebas Neue for all headings, prices, labels. Space Grotesk for body, descriptions, forms. Shared across all pages.

HeroBebas Neue · clamp(2.5-3.5rem)
JOUW EVENT VERDIENT DIT MOMENT
H1Bebas Neue · 2.5rem
MAGIC MIRROR XL
H2Bebas Neue · 2rem
MAAK HET COMPLEET
BodySpace Grotesk 400 · 15px
Gasten die weken later nog praten over jouw feest. Premium photobooth & DJ entertainment in de Randstad.
SmallSpace Grotesk · 13px
Reactie binnen 24 uur · 100% vrijblijvend
Label600 · 10px · UC
MEEST GEKOZEN · EVENTS VERZORGD
DJ Gradientcoral → violet → cyan
OUR DJS

Spacing & Radius

Tokens

TokenValueUsage
--r-sm8pxInputs, swatches
--r-md12pxCards, upgrade rows
--r-lg16pxBrowser frames, form cards
--r-pill999pxButtons, tags, price pills
--easecubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)All transitions

Components

UI Elements

Buttons

Price Pills

Vanaf €599 Vanaf €199 Vanaf €149

Tags

MEEST GEKOZEN DJ SET AFRO BEATS HOUSE BESCHIKBAAR

Rules

Color Rules

RuleDetail
Gold buttonsAlways #000 text. Never white on gold.
Violet buttonsWhite text. DJ pages only.
No red#ff494a removed. Do not use.
No pink#e839a0 removed. Do not use.
Gold = photoboothAll photobooth CTAs, prices, nav button.
Violet = DJ hubDJ-specific CTAs only.
Coral = GianniProfile elements only.
Cyan = MiloProfile elements only.
Brand namePicYourBooth (one word). PYM BV on invoices only.

Component Library

Shadcn/ui + PYB Theme

We use shadcn/ui as our component library. Components are installed into src/components/ui/ and themed via CSS variables. We never build custom UI components from scratch.

Why Shadcn

BenefitDetail
Copy-pasteNo package dependency — full control over every component
Radix primitivesAccessible out of the box — ARIA, focus management, keyboard nav
Tailwind nativeMaps 1:1 to our token system via CSS variables
Dark modeCSS variable theming matches our dark cinematic base

PYB → Shadcn Variable Mapping

Shadcn VariablePYB TokenValue
--background--bg#08080b
--foreground--text#ededf0
--card--surface#111116
--muted--surface-up#18181e
--muted-foreground--text-mutedrgba(237,237,240,0.60)
--border--borderrgba(255,255,255,0.06)
--primary--gold#d4b14e (photobooth default)
--primary-foreground#000Black text on gold buttons
--ring--goldFocus ring color

Segment Overrides

Applied via data-segment attribute on page containers. Swaps --primary accent.

Segmentdata-segment--primary--primary-foreground
Photobooth (default)—#d4b14e gold#000 black
DJ Hub"dj"#8b5cf6 violet#fff white
DJ Gianni"gianni"#f0654a coral#fff white
Milo"milo"#22d3ee cyan#000 black

Core Shadcn Components

ComponentPYB Usage
ButtonGold CTAs, Violet DJ CTAs, Ghost links, Outline secondary
CardService cards, package cards, testimonials
Input + LabelProposal form fields (gold focus ring)
SelectEvent type dropdown
SwitchPackage builder upgrade toggles
BadgeMEEST GEKOZEN, prices, genre tags
DialogUpgrade info modals (?)
AccordionFAQ sections
NavigationMenu + SheetDesktop nav + mobile hamburger
RadioGroupDJ extra hours selector
Sonner (Toast)Form submission feedback

PYB Custom Components (built on Shadcn)

ComponentShadcn BasePurpose
NavNavigationMenu + Sheet + ButtonShared nav with mobile hamburger
HeroCustom (no Shadcn base)Page hero with headline, visual, CTA
ServiceCardCard + Badge + ButtonHomepage service card with price pill
ProofBarCustomSocial proof numbers (237+ Events, 4.9★)
PackageBuilderCard + Switch + Badge + ButtonInteractive package configurator
UpgradeRowSwitch + Dialog + BadgeSingle upgrade toggle with info modal
ProposalFormInput + Label + Select + Textarea + Button + Sonner6-field proposal form with validation
DJProfileCard + Badge + ButtonDJ profile with avatar, genres, socials
BookingWizardRadioGroup + Card + Badge + ButtonDJ hour selector with running total
FAQAccordionObjection-handling FAQ
TestimonialCard + SeparatorQuote block with gold dividers

Implementation

Tailwind Config

PYB design tokens mapped to Tailwind. Font classes: font-display (Bebas Neue), font-sans (Space Grotesk).

// tailwind.config.ts
{
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        background: '#08080b',
        foreground: '#ededf0',
        surface: '#111116',
        elevated: '#18181e',
        gold: '#d4b14e',
        violet: '#8b5cf6',
        coral: '#f0654a',
        cyan: '#22d3ee',
      },
      fontFamily: {
        display: ['Bebas Neue', 'sans-serif'],
        sans: ['Space Grotesk', 'sans-serif'],
      },
      borderRadius: {
        sm: '8px',
        md: '12px',
        lg: '16px',
        pill: '999px',
      },
    },
  },
}

Files

Design System Files

FileContent
pyb-design-system-web.htmlThis file — tokens, colors, typography, components, Shadcn mapping, rules
pyb-design-system-photobooth.htmlHomepage, Magic Mirror XL, Party Booth, Proposal Form mockups

component-library.mdFull Shadcn component library spec, install commands, PYB variants
.impeccable.md (root)Design context for Impeccable quality skills
